description: Discover the perfect blend of rugged capability and modern convenience in this 2017 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Sport. With its commanding presence and exceptional off-road prowess, this Wrangler is ready to take you on unforgettable adventures, whether you're exploring the great outdoors or navigating the urban jungle.  Highlights of this well-equipped Wrangler include:   Quick Order Package 24S  Dual Top Group with a Black 3-Piece Hard Top and Premium Black Sunrider Soft Top  5-Speed Automatic Transmission with Tip Start and Hill Descent Control  Radio 430 with Remote USB Port  SIRIUS Satellite Radio with 1-Year Subscription  This Wrangler's robust 3.6L V6 engine, paired with the capable 4-wheel-drive system, delivers the power and traction you need to conquer any terrain. Enjoy the convenience of the 5-speed automatic transmission, which includes Tip Start and Hill Descent Control, making your driving experience both effortless and confident.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a host of premium features that elevate the Wrangler's already impressive capabilities. The Dual Top Group provides you with the flexibility to choose between the hard top for all-weather protection or the soft top for open-air freedom. The Radio 430 system with Remote USB Port keeps you connected and entertained, while the SIRIUS Satellite Radio with a 1-year subscription provides endless entertainment options.  The Power Convenience Group adds thoughtful touches like power locks, remote keyless entry, and power-heated mirrors, making your daily commute or weekend adventures more comfortable and convenient. The Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel and Chrome/Leather-Wrapped Shift Knob add a touch of refinement to the Wrangler's rugged persona.  Whether you're tackling the great outdoors or navigating the city streets, this 2017 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Sport is the perfect companion. With its exceptional capabilities, premium features, and timeless design, it's a true icon that will elevate your driving experience to new heights. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate why this Wrangler is the perfect fit for your lifestyle.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Quick Order Package 24S,1-Yr SiriusXM Radio Service,8 Speakers,AM/FM radio,CD player,Radio: 130,Radio: 430,Remote USB Port,SIRIUS Satellite Radio,Air Conditioning,Rear Window Defroster,Front 1-Touch Down Power Windows,Power Locks,Power steering,Remote Keyless Entry,Security Alarm,Steering wheel mounted audio controls,Normal Duty Suspension,Traction control,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,ABS brakes,Dual front impact airbags,Front anti-roll bar,Integrated roll-over protection,Low tire pressure warning,Occupant sensing airbag,Rear anti-roll bar,Brake assist,Electronic Stability Control,Front fog lights,Speed control,Black 3-Piece Hard Top,Delete Sunrider Soft Top,Power Heated Mirrors,Auto-Dimming Mirror w/Reading Lamp,Chrome/Leather Wrapped Shift Knob,Cloth Seats w/Adjustable Head Restraints,Compass,Driver door bin,Driver vanity mirror,Freedom Top Hard Top Headliner,Leather Wrapped Steering Wheel,Outside temperature display,Passenger vanity mirror,Power Convenience Group,Tachometer,Tilt steering wheel,Trip computer,Front Bucket Seats,Split folding rear seat,Freedom Panel Storage Bag,Front Center Armrest w/Storage,Passenger door bin,16" x 7.0" Luxury Styled Steel Wheels,17" x 7.5" Aluminum Wheels,Deep Tint Sunscreen Windows,Rear Window Wiper/Washer,Variably intermittent wipers,3.21 Rear Axle Ratio

description: Our great looking Clean Carfax and Maryland State Inspected 2017 Audi Q7 2.0 TFSI Premium Plus is impressive in Ink Blue Metallic. Powered by a Turbocharged 2.0 Liter 4 Cylinder that delivers 252hp while paired with an 8 Speed Automatic Transmission, this All Wheel Drive SUV is refined, responsive, and ready for every journey. The bold exterior features LED lighting, aluminum body accents, a power sunroof, rain sensing wipers, and stylish 18 inch wheels for a commanding presence on the road.  Inside our Q7 Premium Plus, you will find a thoughtfully designed cabin with leather seating, heated power front seats, memory functions, and a versatile 35-30-35 split folding second row with a 50-50 split third row. Premium touches include a leather wrapped steering wheel, high gloss black and gray oak inlays, and a panoramic glass sunroof with power sunshade. Technology is at your fingertips with Audi MMI infotainment system displayed on a high resolution screen, navigation preparation, Bluetooth, available rear seat entertainment prep, and the powerful optional Bose Surround Sound system with 19 speakers and 15 channel amplifier. description: This 2018 Audi SQ5 3.0T Quattro Prestige is a well-maintained luxury SUV offered in excellent condition. The vehicle has had two owners, with the most recent one acquiring it in 2021. The car's odometer reads 36,152 miles and has been serviced regularly, with oil changes and brake checks performed. The exterior color is Moonlight Blue Metallic, and the interior features luxurious Rotor Gray leather and Alcantara upholstery.  The 2018 Audi SQ5 3.0T Quattro Prestige is powered by a 3.0L V6 engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and Audi's quattro all-wheel-drive system. It comes with a range of premium features, including a Bang & Olufsen sound system, a navigation system, a backup camera, and a panoramic sunroof. Additional features include Audi's Virtual Cockpit, adaptive cruise control, heated and ventilated front seats, and a power liftgate. Safety features include lane assist, rear cross-traffic alert, and front and side airbags. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate  and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.    To be sure you don't miss out, give us a call at  and schedule a test drive. We are located at 2634 Lakeside Drive Lynchburg VA 24501. description: Recent Arrival! 2018 Subaru WRX STi AWD Close-Ratio 6-Speed Manual 2.5L DOHC Intercooled High Boost Turbocharged Alloy Wheel Locks, Auto-Dimming Mirror w/Compass & HomeLink, Cargo Tray, Center Armrest Extension - Black, Keyless Access w/Push Button Start, Popular Package #3, Rear Bumper Applique, RECARO Front Seats w/Keyless Access, RECARO Performance Design Front Seats, STI Carbon Fiber Trunk Trim, STI Shift Knob, STI Short Throw Shifter (STI), STI Short Throw Shifter Package.For drivers who demand more than ordinary, the 2018 Subaru WRX STI stands as a true performance icon. Born from Subarus legendary rally heritage and engineered for drivers who crave total control, this WRX STI delivers an unmatched blend of turbocharged power, confidence-inspiring all-wheel drive, and aggressive design that turns every drive into an event. Whether youre carving through back roads, commuting with purpose, or simply enjoying the thrill of a perfectly balanced performance sedan, the WRX STI continues to set the benchmark.From its unmistakable exterior styling to its motorsport-inspired interior and proven mechanical pedigree, the 2018 WRX STI isnt just a carits a statement. Its designed for enthusiasts, respected by purists, and admired by anyone who appreciates authentic performance engineering.At the heart of the 2018 Subaru WRX STI lies a 2.5-liter turbocharged BOXER engine, delivering 305 horsepower and 290 lb-ft of torque. This iconic flat-four engine is known not only for its power output but also for its low center of gravity, which plays a critical role in the STIs exceptional handling and balance. Power delivery is immediate, responsive, and thrilling, providing strong acceleration across the rev range and the kind of engagement that true drivers appreciate.Paired with a 6-speed manual transmission, the WRX STI keeps the driver fully connected to the road. Each gear change is crisp and purposeful, reinforcing the cars performance-first philosophy. This is a vehicle designed to be driven, not just operated.Subarus legendary Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive system comes standard, delivering outstanding traction in all conditions. Rain, snow, gravel, or dry pavementthe WRX STI remains planted and predictable, giving you confidence no matter where the road leads. Adding to its dynamic capabilities is the Driver Controlled Center Differential (DCCD), which allows drivers to fine-tune torque distribution for different driving styles and road conditions. description: Discover the exceptional 2018 Nissan Armada SV, a powerful and versatile SUV that's ready to elevate your driving experience. With its commanding presence and impressive capabilities, this Armada is poised to exceed your expectations and become the ultimate companion for your adventures.  Highlighted Features:  Driver Package: Includes Auto-Dimming Rearview Mirror, Homelink Universal Garage Door Opener, Power Liftgate, Trailer Towing Harness, and Power 3rd Row 60/40 Split Fold-Flat Bench Seat  Roof Rail Cross Bars  Interior Lighting Package  2nd & 3rd Row Carpeted Mats  This Armada SV is equipped with a robust 5.6L V8 DOHC 32V Endurance engine, mated to a 7-Speed Automatic transmission, delivering a potent and responsive performance. With its rear-wheel-drive configuration, you'll experience exceptional handling and control, whether navigating winding roads or tackling challenging terrain.  The exterior of this Armada SV is adorned in a sleek Silver finish, exuding a refined and sophisticated presence. The 18-inch Alloy Wheels and Roof Rail Cross Bars add a touch of style and practicality, enhancing both the visual appeal and the versatility of this SUV.  Step inside the cabin and you'll be greeted by a wealth of premium features, including Heated Front Bucket Seats, a Power 3rd Row 60/40 Split Fold-Flat Bench Seat, and a Bose Audio System with 13 Speakers. The Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control and Rear Air Conditioning ensure the ultimate in comfort for all passengers, while the Rearview Camera and Rear Window Wiper provide added convenience and visibility.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and this Armada SV is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety technologies, including Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, and Electronic Stability Control. You can navigate with confidence, knowing that you and your loved ones are well-protected.  Whether you're embarking on family adventures, towing heavy loads, or simply seeking a commanding presence on the road, the 2018 Nissan Armada SV is the perfect choice. Experience the power, versatility, and refined sophistication that this exceptional SUV has to offer. From its confident exterior design to its thoughtfully laid-out interior and well-engineered performance, this RAV4 continues to stand out in one of the most competitive segments on the market.Step inside the 2018 RAV4 LE and youll find a cabin designed with real life in mind. Toyota focused on durability, comfort, and ease of usequalities that have helped make the RAV4 one of the best-selling SUVs in America.Supportive cloth seating provides comfort for both short drives and long road trips, while the driver-focused cockpit puts controls right where you expect them. The layout is intuitive and uncluttered, so adjusting climate settings or audio controls feels natural and distraction-free.The RAV4 LE comfortably seats up to five passengers, offering generous headroom and legroom in both rows. Rear passengers enjoy plenty of space, making this an excellent vehicle for families, carpools, or road-trip companions. Thoughtful storage solutions throughout the cabincupholders, door pockets, and center console storagehelp keep everything organized and within reach.Under the hood, the 2018 Toyota RAV4 LE is powered by a proven 2.5-liter 4-cylinder engine that delivers a smooth balance of power and efficiency. Paired with a responsive automatic transmission, this powertrain provides confident acceleration for merging onto highways while remaining composed and fuel-efficient during daily driving.Toyota engineered the RAV4 for stability and comfort, with a suspension system that absorbs road imperfections while maintaining precise handling. Steering is light and predictable, making the RAV4 easy to drive for both new and experienced drivers alike.Front-wheel drive comes standard, offering excellent efficiency and everyday traction, while available all-wheel drive adds extra confidence in rain, snow, or uneven road conditions. No matter where your day takes you, the RAV4 LE is designed to deliver a smooth, controlled driving experience.an impressive suite of standard safety features. Equipped with Toyota Safety Sense P, this RAV4 includes advanced driver-assistance technologies designed to help protect you and your passengers on every drive.Key safety features include:Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection to help reduce the risk of frontal collisionsLane Departure Alert to help keep you centered in your laneDynamic Radar Cruise Control for relaxed highway drivingAutomatic High Beams to improve nighttime visibilityIn addition, a standard backup camera provides added confidence when reversing, while stability control, traction control, and a comprehensive airbag system contribute to overall peace of mind. description: At Miracle Autosport, we believe in providing a transparent, no-hassle car buying experience. As a one-price dealership, we list our best price online with no surprise negotiations. We're proud of our reputation:4.5+ Stars across all major review platformsA+ Rating with the Better Business BureauCarGurus Top Rated Seller for the last 4 yearsOur FeesAll vehicles are subject to a $695 document fee and a $199 preparation fee, that's it! Any issues we identify are addressed prior to salewhether it's replacing tires or brakes that are below 50% of their usable life, resolving any suspension noises or vibrations, or repairing any damages beyond normal wear and tear. While we can't predict the future, we take every measure to ensure your vehicle is as smooth, reliable, and hassle-free as possible.Now, let's dive into the details of the vehicle you're interested in below.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------2018 BMW 530e xDrive iPerformance Sedan  Bluestone Metallic / Black Dakota Leather  86,278 MilesHere's a beautifully kept, well-optioned 2018 BMW 530e xDrive iPerformance finished in stunning Bluestone Metallic over Black Dakota leather. This is a 2-owner, accident-free Carfax car with an excellent BMW dealer service history  and it was just serviced and checked over by BMW of Rockville less than 125 miles ago. Inside and out, it's absolutely beautiful. Non-smoker owned, no warning lights or service indicators on the dash, and it drives exactly like a proper BMW should: smooth, tight, quiet, and confidence-inspiring.If you're looking for a luxury sport sedan that blends performance, efficiency, and all-wheel-drive confidence, this one checks every box.Inspection & MaintenanceOur service department performed a thorough inspection and test drive. All wear-and-tear items were found to be well within proper spec with one exception: the rear brake pads, which we are replacing prior to sale. The matching set of Pirelli tires is in excellent condition, brakes otherwise check out great, and everything operates exactly as designed. BMW of Rockville just went through the car, and we verified it again in-house  so this one is turnkey and ready.As with every vehicle we sell, this BMW has undergone a detailed inspection and road test by Miracle Autosport's service department to ensure it's in the best shape possible.Standout Features & Options (with original pricing)Original MSRP when new: $66,835Exterior / InteriorBluestone Metallic  $550Black Dakota Leather Upholstery  $1,450Packages & EquipmentM Sport Package  $2,300M Sport Package 2  $5,650Multi-Contour Seats  $750Heated Steering Wheel  $190Park Distance Control  included19' Multi-Spoke Wheels (19' x 8' front / 19' x 9' rear)  $0Other HighlightsxDrive All-Wheel DrivePlug-In Hybrid iPerformance systemSport seats with contrast stitchingM Sport exterior and interior trimPaddle-shift Steptronic automatic transmissionNavigation, Bluetooth, and HiFi sound systemBackup camera and parking sensorsPower memory seatsLED lightingKeyless startDual-zone climate controlOriginal shipping charge: $995ConditionThe body is very clean, paint presents beautifully, and the interior looks fantastic with no smoke smells or abuse. Adult owned, clearly cared for, and it shows. Everything works as it should  no stories, no surprises, just a properly maintained BMW that drives incredibly well.ClosingA plug-in hybrid BMW 5-Series with xDrive, M Sport packages, multi-contour seats, fresh service, and rear brakes being done prior to delivery  this is a lot of car for the money. If you want luxury, performance, and efficiency wrapped into one sharp-looking sedan, this 530e deserves a serious look.Miracle Autosport  CarGurus Top Rated Seller (last 4 years) and top rated on all respected dealer review sites. description: Discover the Exceptional 2018 Nissan Titan SV - Elevate Your Driving Experience  Boasting a powerful 5.6L V8 engine, the 2018 Nissan Titan SV is a true force to be reckoned with on the road. With its commanding 4-wheel drive capabilities and impressive towing capacity, this truck is ready to tackle any adventure you have in mind. But the Titan SV is more than just raw power - it's a sophisticated and well-equipped vehicle that delivers unparalleled comfort and convenience.  Key features include:  SV Convenience Package  Blind Spot Warning with Rear Cross Traffic Alert  Heated Front Captain's Chairs  Dual Zone Automatic HVAC  Nissan Navigation System with Voice Guidance  Siri Eyes Free  Rear Air Conditioning Vents  Power Sliding Rear Window with Defogger  Rain Sensing Wipers  The SV Convenience Package takes this Titan to the next level, offering a wealth of premium amenities that will elevate your driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of automatic headlights, a receiver hitch, and front and rear parking sensors, as well as the added security of the Blind Spot Warning and Rear Cross Traffic Alert systems.  Step inside and you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring heated front captain's chairs and dual-zone automatic climate control for optimal comfort. The Nissan Navigation System with voice guidance keeps you on track, while Siri Eyes Free integration allows you to stay connected without taking your eyes off the road.  With its impressive towing capacity, rugged 4WD capabilities, and exceptional array of features, the 2018 Nissan Titan SV is the perfect companion for your next adventure. Whether you're hauling heavy loads, navigating rough terrain, or simply enjoying a comfortable and connected driving experience, this truck is up to the task.  We invite you to experience the power and sophistication of the 2018 Nissan Titan SV for yourself. description: Vehicle Details: Discover luxury, capability, and value with this 2018 Lincoln Navigator L Reserve 4WD, located in Greenville, SC. This expansive SUV pairs a powerful V6 3.5L gasoline engine with refined design and premium amenities to deliver an exceptional driving experience for families and executives alike. Inside, enjoy integrated Navigation, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto for seamless smartphone connectivity and confident route planning on every journey.  Comfort is king in the Reserve trim: roomy captain's chairs, high-quality materials, and advanced climate control make long trips effortless. Remote Start lets you warm up or cool down the cabin before you step in, and the 4WD system provides traction and stability for variable road conditions across South Carolina and beyond. This Lincoln Navigator L also comes with a CARFAX Clean Report, providing peace of mind about its history and maintenance.  Beyond capability, this vehicle offers standout presence and practicalitytowing-ready performance, generous cargo space, and safety features tailored to protect your passengers. Whether you need premium comfort for daily commutes or confident performance for weekend getaways, this Lincoln Navigator L delivers.  Priced to move, this 2018 Lincoln Navigator L Reserve 4WD is offered at the best price in the areaan exceptional value for a luxury full-size SUV with desirable tech and a documented clean history. Located in Greenville, SC, it's ready for a test drive today. Contact us to schedule your viewing.  Equipment: The vehicle has automated speed control that adjusts to maintain a safe following distance, enhancing highway driving convenience. Keep your hands warm all winter with a heated steering wheel in  this model . You'll never again be lost in a crowded city or a country region with the navigation system on this 2018 Lincoln Navigator L .  Apple CarPlay: Seamless smartphone integration for this unit - stay connected and entertained on the go! Protect the Lincoln Navigator L from unwanted accidents with a cutting edge backup camera system. Start this vehicle from inside with remote start. This Lincoln Navigator L features a hands-free Bluetooth phone system. This Lincoln Navigator L offers Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration. The leather seats in this vehicle are a must for buyers looking for comfort, durability, and style. Our dealership has already run the CARFAX report and it is clean.  A clean CARFAX is a great asset for resale value in the future. Full-time Four Wheel Drive with Terrain Response allows this SUV to optimize power, suspension, and electronics for tenacious traction and sure-footed stability in any terrain. You'll score nearly 19mpg on the highway while enjoying mind-numbing acceleration, a smooth ride, and the ability to tow up to 7,700 pounds! Our Autobiography has a distinguished style that is sure to win you lustful glances.   Once inside this Autobiography Dynamic, the view from the panoramic sunroof and the feel of heated and cooled perforated leather, a heated steering wheel, and rich wood trim exude a sense of sophistication that is quintessential Range Rover. Enjoy a wealth of amenities such as a power liftgate, a surround-view camera, and three-zone climate control. Voice-controlled navigation keeps you on course as you stay connected via Bluetooth® phone/audio and premium audio. Just imagine yourself behind the wheel...then set your sights on your next great adventure!  Land Rover helps you drive confidently with advanced safety features that have been meticulously designed to keep you and your passengers safeguarded. description: The 2018 Audi Q5 2.0T Premium, featuring the remarkable *Premium Plus Package*, is a luxury SUV that perfectly blends sophistication and cutting-edge technology. This vehicle is designed for those who value elegance and functionality, providing an exceptional driving experience that stands out in its class.One of the standout features of the Audi Q5 is its **Smart device mirroring** capability. This technology seamlessly integrates your smartphone with the vehicles infotainment system, allowing you to access your favorite apps and features while keeping your attention on the road. This innovation exemplifies Audis commitment to safety and convenience.Safety is paramount in the Q5, highlighted by the **Forward collision mitigation** system. This advanced feature actively monitors the road ahead, preparing the vehicle and its occupants for potential impacts to minimize the risk of accidents. Additionally, the **Front pedestrian impact prevention** system enhances safety by identifying and tracking pedestrians, taking proactive measures to avoid collisions, making city driving much more secure.Visibility is improved with the **Rear camera**, which provides a clear image of whats behind you, ensuring confident maneuvering in tight spaces. In critical scenarios, the **Brake assist** technology enhances your stopping power, allowing for swift reactions when unexpected obstacles appear.Long road trips are made more comfortable with the **Cruise control** feature, which maintains a steady speed, reducing driver fatigue and enhancing fuel efficiency. The **Power open and close liftgate** adds convenience, enabling easy access to the cargo area without the hassle of setting down your items.Comfort in the Q5 is prioritized with **Heated driver and front passenger seats**, ensuring warmth during colder months. The luxurious **Leather seat upholstery** not only elevates the aesthetic appeal but also provides a refined atmosphere inside the cabin.Audi has designed the Q5 with driver ergonomics in mind, featuring **Power 4-way driver lumbar support** and various adjustable seating options. This attention to comfort ensures that every journey, whether short or long, is enjoyable.In conclusion, the 2018 Audi Q5 2.0T Premium, equipped with the *Premium Plus Package*, offers an unparalleled combination of luxury, safety, and innovative technology. Its thoughtful design and premium features set a high standard in the luxury SUV market, making it an exceptional choice for discerning drivers seeking both style and performance. description: Introducing the rugged and reliable 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT, the ultimate truck for all your hauling and towing needs! With extra spacing, you and your passengers will have plenty of room to stretch out and relax on those long drives. The LT trim level also comes equipped with the latest technology, including a 7-inch touchscreen display, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility, and a 6-speaker sound system.But the Silverado 1500 LT is not just about comfort and convenience, it's also built for tough jobs. With a maximum towing capacity of up to 12,500 lbs and a payload capacity of up to 2,250 lbs, this truck is ready to take on any challenge. The LT also offers a variety of available packages, such as the Z71 Off-Road Package and the Max Trailering Package, to further enhance its capabilities.Safety is also a top priority with the Silverado 1500 LT, which comes equipped with features like a rear vision camera, StabiliTrak stability control system, and a suite of airbags to keep you and your passengers protected on the road.Don't miss out on your chance to own the 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT, the ultimate combination of power, comfort, and capability. Come in for a test drive today and see for yourself why this truck is a top choice among drivers. description: Thank you for choosing Butler Toyota of Jacksonville, this Magnetic Gray Metallic 2018 Toyota Tacoma TRD Sport is a great choice! Check out the following:   One Owner!   City 19/ Hwy 24         TRD Premium Sport Package ($2,735 value)120V/400W Deck Mounted AC PowerDual Zone Automatic Climate ControlEngine ImmobilizerAutomatic HeadlightsColor Keyed Rear BumperSmartphone and Mobile Device ChargerLED Daytime Running LampsWide Angle Front Fog LampsHeated Front SeatsSmart Key with Push Button StartLeather Seat TrimPower Tilt/slide MoonroofEntune Premium JBL AM/FM/CD Radio with Navigation and App SuiteP265/65R17 AS Tires17 X 7.5 Machined Alloy Wheels  Convenience Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.   Don't miss out, come see us at 1290 Cassat Ave Jacksonville FL 32205 or call us at  and schedule a test drive today!  Family Owned since 1970.
